hooks.template: This represents your X before, during, and after X
hooks.text: This is a $50K wire before and after a bank quietly touches it.

hooks.template: They said, "(insert famous cliché or quote)" — that's a lie.
hooks.text: They told this business owner the wire fee was the cost. That's a lie.

hooks.template: Just # (insert item/action) took my client from (insert before) to (insert after).
hooks.text: One hidden rate margin took a supplier from $50K to $48,500.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner wired $50K yesterday. The supplier got $48,500.
Stop blaming the wire fee. The real cost is the exchange rate.
